title: Behind the Crime: The Nipsey Hussle Murder
original_title: Behind the Crime: The Nipsey Hussle Murder
overview: As told by the people involved, and using real footage from the tragic event, we take a deep dive into the murder trial, story, and case of rap icon and street legend Nipsey Hussle.
